title: Straame Pack of 12 or 24 Black Safety Work Gloves, Outdoors PU and Nylon Non-Slip Work Handling Gloves, Good Dexterity Firm Grip Protective Working Gloves Size (Pack of 12 Pair's, L)
features: WORK GLOVES: Perfect for every material handing product work. Thanks to their non-slip coated material, these working gloves are suitable for carrying rough and bulky objects in a high range of applications such as builders, construction, warehouse, mechanic or even gardening, grabbing bricklaying tools or any other function that needs a firm grip.
